org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class ErsapRequests

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.ErsapRequests

  • public final class ErsapRequests
extends java.lang.Object
    Requests to running ERSAP components.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  ErsapRequests.DeployContainerRequest
      A request to start a container.
      static class  ErsapRequests.DeployServiceRequest
      A request to start a service.
      static class  ErsapRequests.ExitRequest
      A request to stop a running ERSAP component.
      static class  ErsapRequests.ServiceConfigRequest
      A request to configure a service.
      static class  ErsapRequests.ServiceConfigRequestBuilder
      Builds a request to configure a service.
      static class  ErsapRequests.ServiceExecuteRequest
      A request to execute a service composition.
      static class  ErsapRequests.ServiceExecuteRequestBuilder
      Builds a request to execute a service or a composition.
      static class  ErsapRequests.ServiceReportRequest
      A request to setup the reports of a service.
